description: Four Pelicans flew over my home in Lakewood, CO this morning about 10:00. They were circling around. They were white with black on their wings. We do have some water around here, but we were very surprised to see them. I understand they have been seen in Alamosa and Boulder counties lately, but I wanted to report them anyway.Behaviors: Circled around overhead for about ten minutes. Three stayed very close together, and one circled nearby, but not exactly right with the others.Call: n/aPlumage: White and black
